name: offer_proposal
subject: Service Proposal – {{offer_details}} | {{company_name}}
body:
Dear {{recipient_name}},

Thank you for your interest in our services. We are pleased to present the following proposal:

Service: {{offer_details}}

Proposed Investment: BDT {{price}}

{% if deadline %}

Offer Valid Until: {{deadline}}

{% endif %}

We are confident this proposal aligns with your requirements. Please feel free to reach out if you have any questions or would like to discuss further.

We look forward to the opportunity to work with you.

Warm regards,
{{sender_name}}
{{company_name}}
